title: Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference Cocktail Reception
content:
## Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference Cocktail Reception
Troutman Pepper Locke & McCarthy Tétrault invite you to a cocktail reception with special guests from Eurofins , Lake Street Capital , Bird and Bird LLP , The Nasdaq and The Toronto Stock Exchange following the Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference. Join us for some delicious passed canapes and cocktails on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, at Vagabondo . Thank you for accepting or declining before Friday, April 17, 2026. For questions about this event, please contact: torontoevents@mccarthy.ca or adaeze.ashiedu@troutman.com .
